channel.title: Luma Labs
channel.description: Luma Labs — synthesized feed by ai-news-spider

item.title: Luma Announces The Open Physical AI Lab: An Open Science Effort to Solve Generalization in Physical AI
item.description: To improve human life, AI systems must be able to help us improve the physical world. What stands between us and that prosperous future is the problem of generalization in physical AI. To solve this problem, we are establishing a new open science physical AI lab at Luma.
